verdict: Good planning document with clear priorities and milestones, but lacks deadlines, ownership, and progress tracking.
strengths: Clear priority levels (P0, P1, P2) with visual indicators
Covers essential project phases from architecture to beta release
weaknesses: No deadlines or time estimates for tasks
top_fixes: Add target deadlines for each milestone
Assign owners or teams to each task
Include progress indicators (e.g., percentage or status)
